title: Frontier Queues, Visited Reservation, State Transitions, and Determinism · Go Semantics Case: Priority Heap
summary: Workers share slices and maps, visited is marked after success, duplicate discoveries race, retries overwrite terminal state, and ordering changes every run. Predict owner authority, URL and HTTP state, Go ownership, bounded work, accessibility impact, failure, cleanup, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the crawler go priority heap increment in race-safe deterministic frontier state machine. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory,…
objectives: Use stable priority and tie keys for owner commitments, depth, page class, freshness, origin fairness, and retry readiness.
Reserve admitted URL keys atomically before enqueue so concurrent discoveries cannot duplicate effects.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
